# AI Image Generator

## Overview
Discover the power of AI with our innovative text-to-image generator! Transform your ideas into stunning visuals instantly, experiment with prompts, explore unique styles like cartoons, oil paintings, or sketches, and let your creativity shine through. Whether you're an artist, designer, or creative soul, our tool offers endless possibilities to bring your vision to life. Add images as references to inspire new artistic directions while letting AI refine them into entirely original masterpieces.

Want more inspirations? Please refer to https://yce.makeupar.com/ai-art-generator.

Use cases:
![AI Image Generator](https://bcw-media.s3.ap-northeast-1.amazonaws.com/text_to_image_v3_video_02f161f909.jpg "AI Image Generator")

![AI Image Generator](https://bcw-media.s3.ap-northeast-1.amazonaws.com/text_to_image_v4_poster_092d2fbb9f.jpg "AI Image Generator")

Sample output:
![AI Image Generator](https://bcw-media.s3.ap-northeast-1.amazonaws.com/text_to_image_topbanner_dt_2_e325681588.jpg "AI Image Generator")

![AI Image Generator](https://bcw-media.s3.ap-northeast-1.amazonaws.com/text_to_image_topbanner_dt_5_8b4fa13c6a.jpg "AI Image Generator")

### File Specs & Errors

* Supported Formats & Dimensions

|AI Feature|Supported Dimensions|Supported File Size|Supported Formats|
| ---- | ---- | ---- | ---- |
| V1.0 Text to Image | Output: 1024 pixels on the long side. | Prompt cannot exceed 500 characters | N/A |
| V2.0 Text to Image | Output: The default resolution is 1664 Ă— 928, with supported resolutions of 1664 Ă— 928 (16:9), 1472 Ă— 1104 (4:3), 1328 Ă— 1328 (1:1), 1104 Ă— 1472 (3:4), and 928 Ă— 1664 (9:16). | Prompt cannot exceed 800 characters | N/A |
| V2.0 Image to Image | Input: Both the width and height must fall within the range of 384 to 3072 pixels. <br>Output: Customizable width and height range from 512 to 2,048 pixels, while the default configuration maintains a total pixel count of approximately 1,024 Ă— 1,024 with an aspect ratio based on the input image. | <10MB<br> Prompt cannot exceed 800 characters | JPG, JPEG, PNG, BMP, TIFF, WEBP, and GIF. <br>For animated GIFs, only the first frame is processed. |

* Error Codes

| Error Code | Description |
| ---------- | ----------- |
| exceed_max_filesize | The uploaded file size exceeds the maximum allowed limit. |
| invalid_parameter | One or more parameters are missing or invalid |
| error_download_image | Failed to download the source image. |
| error_decode_image | Failed to decode or parse the source image. |
| error_nsfw_content_detected | Not Safe For Work content was detected in the source image. |
| error_unsupport_ratio | The aspect ratio of the input image is not supported. |
| unknown_internal_error | An unspecified internal error occurred. |

## Reference

- **API version:** V2.0, V1.0
- **OpenAPI version:** 3.0.0
- **Source:** [OpenAPI description](https://docs.perfectcorp.com/_bundle/reference/ai_image_generator.yaml)
- **Servers:** `https://yce-api-01.makeupar.com`

## Authentication

| Name | Type | Scheme / Location | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| BearerAuthenticationV2 | http | bearer | Use the standard 'Bearer authentication'. Put your 'API Key' in header: `Authorization:Bearer YOUR_API_KEY`. Notice that there is ' ' a space between 'Bearer' and the 'YOUR_API_KEY'. |

## Endpoints

### `POST` `/s2s/v2.0/file/image-to-image/youcam`
**Create a new file V2 for image to image.**

To upload a new file, you'll first need to use the File API. It will give you a URL â€“ use that URL to upload your file. Once the upload is finished, you can use the file_id from the same response to start using our AI features.

**Tags:** V2.0

**Authentication:** BearerAuthenticationV2
#### Request body

**application/json** Â· required

**Schema:** `FileV1.1`

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `files` | `array<object>` | Yes | â€” |
| `files.content_type` | `string` | Yes | Content MIME type for this file. Currently available values are listed in the enum. |
| `files.file_name` | `string` | Yes | Name of this file |
| `files.file_size` | `integer` | Yes | Content length for this file in bytes. Should not be larger than 10MB. |

#### Responses

**200** â€” Successful retrieval of file upload information

Content types: `application/json`

**Schema:** `BasicFileResponse`

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `files` | `array<object>` | No | â€” |
| `files.content_type` | `string` | No | Content MIME type for this file. |
| `files.file_name` | `string` | No | Name of this file |
| `files.file_id` | `string` | No | ID of this file. Other run task API will need this \`file_id\`. |
| `files.requests` | `array<object>` | No | Using upload \`url\`, \`headers\`, \`method\` below to upload file. After completion, the \`file_id\` is used to proceed with calling run task API. |
| `files.requests.headers` | `object` | No | Headers to include when uploading the file |
| `files.requests.url` | `string` | No | URL to upload this file |
| `files.requests.method` | `string` | No | HTTP method to upload this file |

**400** â€” Invalid request parameters

Content types: `application/json`

**Schema:** `object`

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `status` | `integer` | No | Response status |
| `error` | `string` | No | â€” |
| `error_code` | `string` | No | â€” |

Content types: `application/json`

**Schema:** `object`

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `status` | `integer` | No | Response status |
| `error` | `string` | No | â€” |

### `POST` `/s2s/v2.0/task/image-to-image/youcam`
**Run an AI Image Generator task V2 for image to image.**

AI tasks are asynchronous. Prefer webhook-based completion handling when the feature supports webhooks. Configure your webhook endpoint, verify webhook signatures, and use the received `task_id` to query the task result after a `success` or `error` notification. See the [webhook integration guide](/develop/webhook.md) for setup and verification details.

If webhooks are not supported for the feature, or if your integration cannot use webhooks, implement polling. After starting an AI task, keep polling the task status endpoint at the given `polling_interval` until the task status is either `success` or `error`.

Do not stop polling a running task for longer than the allowed polling window. If the task is not polled in time, the task may expire; a later status check can return `InvalidTaskId` even if processing finished, and the consumed units may still be charged.

**Tags:** V2.0

**Authentication:** BearerAuthenticationV2
#### Request body

**application/json** Â· required

**Schema:** `object | object & object`

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `src_file_urls` | `array<string>` | Yes | The file URLs from upload file API. Should provide either 'src_file_urls' or 'src_file_ids'. |
| `src_file_ids` | `array<string>` | Yes | The file IDs from upload file API. Should provide either 'src_file_urls' or 'src_file_ids'. |
| `model` | `string â€” youcam-image-v2` | Yes | Model name. |
| `prompt` | `string` | Yes | The image editing instruction (positive prompt) that describes the elements and visual features you want in the generated image. <br>This parameter supports Chinese and English with a maximum length of 800 characters. Each Chinese character or English letter counts as one character. |
| `negative_prompt` | `string` | No | The negative prompt, describing content you do not want in the generated image. <br>This parameter supports Chinese and English with a maximum length of 500 characters. Each Chinese character or English letter counts as one character. |
| `size` | `string` | No | Specifies the resolution of the output image in the width*height format, such as "1024\*1536". <br>- The width and height must each be in the range of [512, 2048] pixels. <br>- By default, the total number of pixels is approximately 1024\*1024, with an aspect ratio similar to the input image (or the last image in a multi-image request). <br>When you specify the size parameter, the system uses the width and height specified by size as the target and adjusts the width and height of the actual output image to the nearest multiple of 16. For example, if you specify 1033\*1032, the output image dimensions are 1040\*1024. <br>Recommended resolutions for common aspect ratios: <br>- 1:1: 1024\*1024, 1536\*1536 <br>- 2:3: 768\*1152, 1024\*1536 <br>- 3:2: 1152\*768, 1536\*1024 <br>- 3:4: 960\*1280, 1080\*1440 <br>- 4:3: 1280\*960, 1440\*1080 <br>- 9:16: 720\*1280, 1080\*1920 <br>- 16:9: 1280\*720, 1920\*1080 <br>- 21:9: 1344\*576, 2048\*872 |
| `prompt_extend` | `boolean â€” true \| false` | No | Enable smart prompt rewriting. The model optimizes the positive prompt. Does not affect the negative prompt. |

#### Responses

**200** â€” Successful execution of the task

Content types: `application/json`

**Schema:** `BasicRunTaskResponseV2`

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `status` | `integer` | No | Response status |
| `data` | `object` | No | â€” |
| `data.task_id` | `string` | No | ID of this task. Task result is valid to query by this ID for 24 hours. |

**400** â€” Failed execution of task

Content types: `application/json`

**Schema:** `RunError`

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `status` | `integer` | No | Response status |
| `error` | `string` | No | Error message |
| `error_code` | `string â€” InvalidParameters \| CreditInsufficiency \| InvalidStyleGroup \| InvalidStyle \| BadRequest` | No | Error code:   * InvalidParameters - Invalid request parameters   * CreditInsufficiency - Insufficient unit to run   * BadRequest - Unexpected request parameter   * InvalidStyleGroup - Invalid style group id   * InvalidStyle - Invalid style id |

**401** â€” Invalid or missing API key

Content types: `application/json`

**Schema:** `object`

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `status` | `integer` | No | Response status |
| `error` | `string` | No | â€” |

**429** â€” Too many requests

Content types: `application/json`

**Schema:** `object`

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `status` | `integer` | No | Response status |
| `error` | `string` | No | â€” |

### `POST` `/s2s/v2.0/task/text-to-image`
**Run an AI Image Generator task.**

AI tasks are asynchronous. Prefer webhook-based completion handling when the feature supports webhooks. Configure your webhook endpoint, verify webhook signatures, and use the received `task_id` to query the task result after a `success` or `error` notification. See the [webhook integration guide](/develop/webhook.md) for setup and verification details.

If webhooks are not supported for the feature, or if your integration cannot use webhooks, implement polling. After starting an AI task, keep polling the task status endpoint at the given `polling_interval` until the task status is either `success` or `error`.

Do not stop polling a running task for longer than the allowed polling window. If the task is not polled in time, the task may expire; a later status check can return `InvalidTaskId` even if processing finished, and the consumed units may still be charged.

**Tags:** V1.0

**Authentication:** BearerAuthenticationV2
#### Request body

**application/json** Â· required

**Schema:** `object`

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `prompt` | `string` | Yes | Prompt to generate image |
| `negative_prompt` | `string` | No | Prompt what DO NOT want |
| `template_id` | `string` | Yes | ID of the template. List predefined templates first, and use the id of a template. |
| `steps` | `integer` | No | Steps affect image quality and time of processing. <br> Recommended Step Counts <br> 10-15 Steps: Ideal for quick prompt testing and making broad tweaks. <br> 15â€“20 Steps: The community sweet spot. Most models hit their ideal quality-to-time ratio in this range. <br> 20â€“30 Steps: Best for generating highly detailed subjects, like faces, fur, or architectural elements. |
| `cfg_scale` | `number` | No | The CFG (Classifier-Free Guidance) scale is a mathematical setting that dictates how strictly an AI model adheres to your text prompt. <br> Low CFG (1 â€“ 4): The AI has high creative freedom. It loosely interprets your prompt, which can lead to abstract, painterly results, or images that wander off-topic entirely. <br> Medium CFG (5 â€“ 10): The ideal sweet spot. The generator follows your text closely while still maintaining natural, high-quality visuals. <br> High CFG (11+): The AI clings to every single word in your prompt. While details become sharper and more literal, pushing the scale too high often results in over-saturated colors, noise, and unnatural artifacts. |
| `seed` | `array<integer>` | No | Each image is generated with a unique seed. Using same seed to recreate the same image. Only accept 1 seed. |
| `width_ratio` | `integer` | No | The width of ratio of image. |
| `height_ratio` | `integer` | No | The height of ratio of image. |

#### Responses

**200** â€” Successful execution of the task

Content types: `application/json`

**Schema:** `BasicRunTaskResponseV2`

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `status` | `integer` | No | Response status |
| `data` | `object` | No | â€” |
| `data.task_id` | `string` | No | ID of this task. Task result is valid to query by this ID for 24 hours. |

**400** â€” Failed execution of task

Content types: `application/json`

**Schema:** `RunError`

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `status` | `integer` | No | Response status |
| `error` | `string` | No | Error message |
| `error_code` | `string â€” InvalidParameters \| CreditInsufficiency \| InvalidStyleGroup \| InvalidStyle \| BadRequest` | No | Error code:   * InvalidParameters - Invalid request parameters   * CreditInsufficiency - Insufficient unit to run   * BadRequest - Unexpected request parameter   * InvalidStyleGroup - Invalid style group id   * InvalidStyle - Invalid style id |

**401** â€” Invalid or missing API key

Content types: `application/json`

**Schema:** `object`

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `status` | `integer` | No | Response status |
| `error` | `string` | No | â€” |

**429** â€” Too many requests

Content types: `application/json`

**Schema:** `object`

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `status` | `integer` | No | Response status |
| `error` | `string` | No | â€” |

### `POST` `/s2s/v2.0/task/text-to-image/youcam`
**Run an AI Image Generator task V2 for text to image.**

AI tasks are asynchronous. Prefer webhook-based completion handling when the feature supports webhooks. Configure your webhook endpoint, verify webhook signatures, and use the received `task_id` to query the task result after a `success` or `error` notification. See the [webhook integration guide](/develop/webhook.md) for setup and verification details.

If webhooks are not supported for the feature, or if your integration cannot use webhooks, implement polling. After starting an AI task, keep polling the task status endpoint at the given `polling_interval` until the task status is either `success` or `error`.

Do not stop polling a running task for longer than the allowed polling window. If the task is not polled in time, the task may expire; a later status check can return `InvalidTaskId` even if processing finished, and the consumed units may still be charged.

**Tags:** V2.0

**Authentication:** BearerAuthenticationV2

**application/json** Â· required

| Field | Type | Required | Description |

| `prompt` | `string` | Yes | A positive prompt describing the image content, style, and composition you want. <br>Supports Chinese and English. Maximum length is 800 characters. Each Chinese character, letter, digit, or symbol counts as one character. |
| `negative_prompt` | `string` | No | A negative prompt describing what you do not want in the image. <br>Supports Chinese and English. Maximum length is 500 characters. |
| `size` | `string â€” 1664*928 \| 1472*1104 \| 1328*1328 \| 1104*1472 \| 928*1664` | No | Output image resolution, formatted as width\*height. <br> Supported resolutions and their aspect ratios: <br>- 1664\*928 (default): 16:9 <br>- 1472\*1104: 4:3 <br>- 1328\*1328: 1:1 <br>- 1104\*1472: 3:4 <br>- 928\*1664: 9:16 |
| `prompt_extend` | `boolean â€” true \| false` | No | Enable smart prompt rewriting. The model optimizes the positive prompt. Does not affect the negative prompt. |

**200** â€” Successful execution of the task

Content types: `application/json`

**Schema:** `RunError`

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `status` | `integer` | No | Response status |

| `error_code` | `string â€” InvalidParameters \| CreditInsufficiency \| InvalidStyleGroup \| InvalidStyle \| BadRequest` | No | Error code:   * InvalidParameters - Invalid request parameters   * CreditInsufficiency - Insufficient unit to run   * BadRequest - Unexpected request parameter   * InvalidStyleGroup - Invalid style group id   * InvalidStyle - Invalid style id |
